Il2CppToolkit.ReverseCompiler.Cli 2.1.1-alpha+2161130a92
Copyright (C) 2026 Il2CppToolkit.ReverseCompiler.Cli

  -v, --verbose               Set output to verbose messages.

  -n, --name                  Required. Output assembly name

  -a, --assembly-version      Output assembly version

  -g, --game-assembly         Required. Path to GameAssembly.dll

  -m, --metadata              Required. Path to global-metadata.dat

  -i, --include               Types to include.

  -x, --exclude               Types to exclude.

  -b, --nominal-types         Types to include as nominal (opaque), if
                              supported.

  -o, --out-path              Required. Output file path

  -w, --warnings-as-errors    Treat warnings as errors

  -t, --target                List of compile targets

  --help                      Display this help screen.

  --version                   Display version information.
